shows.title: Magic & Perception / Cryptids & Mysteries
shows.first_half: First Half: Brandon Scott will discuss his journey from childhood magician to international performer, sharing extraordinary stories from behind the curtain, encounters with notable personalities, and experiences that challenged his understanding of coincidence, perception, and reality itself.
shows.second_half: Second Half: Author and wildlife biologist Pat Spain talks about his search for various cryptids, the realities of making television, and the mysteries that still lurk in remote locations and in our conscious minds. He'll also delve into his research on irrational fear and aliens.

shows.title: Creating a Spiritual Helper / Ghostly Adventures
shows.guests: Joshua P. Warren, Ross Allison, June Nixon
shows.first_half: First Half: Paranormal investigator Joshua P. Warren reveals what he says is a simple technique for creating a spiritual helper. He'll explain his research into these "fairy" entities and how they can be called upon to assist with everything from finances and relationships to achieving personal goals.
shows.second_half: Second Half: Paranormal investigators Ross Allison and June Nixon recount their ghostly adventures exploring some of Europe's spookiest locations, including Chillingham Castle, considered one of the UK's most haunted. The duo has spent years researching more than 100 castles steeped in legends of supernatural encounters.

shows.title: Ancient UFOs / Messages from Spirit
shows.first_half: First Half: Researcher Jason Martell explores evidence he believes links modern UFO sightings with accounts recorded by ancient civilizations and religious texts. Drawing from Sumerian and Egyptian traditions, as well as biblical narratives, he'll discuss reports of mysterious flying craft, advanced technologies, and encounters with beings.
shows.second_half: Second Half: Medical intuitive and medium Kimberly Meredith discusses soul frequencies, messages from the afterlife, and the importance of cultivating a relationship with spirit guides and angels. She'll also share her own contactee experience and how it shaped her spiritual path.

shows.title: Mysticism & Jim Morrison / Open Lines
shows.first_half: Today, July 3, marks the anniversary of the death of legendary singer, songwriter, and poet Jim Morrison, frontman of The Doors and a member of the infamous "27 Club." Author Paul Wyld will explore the spiritual dimensions of Morrison's life, examining how his mysticism, creativity, and quest for transcendence shaped both his destiny and enduring legacy. He'll also discuss the profound influence Morrison continues to have on generations of artists, musicians, and seekers. Followed by Open Lives in the latter half. Give George a call and discuss whatever is on your mind!
